one_time_description: Cold Lake Air Weapons Range Settlement of $28,132,700 received; $24,238,581 contributed to Birch Narrows Dene Nation Membership Trust; $269,119 in legal fees; net $3,625,000 retained in lawyers trust account
economic_notes: Dene Nation is a member of Meadow Lake Tribal Council (nine Nations). Birch Narrows Development Limited Partnership is a wholly owned GBE with net income of $297,024 in 2022. Major capital projects in progress: Road Re-Grading ($1,705,000 budget), SWTS ($1,806,800 budget), Nurse Residences ($417,000 budget). Grocery and Gas Bar operated as consolidated entity.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (ended March 31, 2022), not 2024. Province is Saskatchewan (SK). Comparative 2021 figures were restated due to correction of error — investments in MLTC Resource Development LP and Inc. reclassified from modified equity GBEs to portfolio investments at cost, reducing accumulated surplus by $6,436,670. Trust Settlement of $28.1M (Cold Lake Air Weapons Range) is a major one-time item; $24.2M contributed to independent Membership Trust (not consolidated), $3.625M held in lawyers trust pending contingent legal fee dispute. RBC loan covenant violation noted (late financial statements) but debt not called. Consolidated entities: Birch Narrows Dene Nation, Birch Ridge Educational Authority, Birch Narrows Dene Nation CMHC Housing Fund, Birch Narrows Grocery and Gas Bar. GBE: Birch Narrows Dene Nation Development Limited Partnership (modified equity). Remuneration schedule not included in extracted text. expenses_administration mapped to Band Support segment; expenses_enterprises mapped to Economic Development segment. Capital segment expenses ($2,285,600) not mapped to a standard category. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC + MLHSDA + MLTC Program Services + MLTC CFS + CMHC subsidy + Health Canada + Northern Lights School Division = 6,985,829+3,302,681+1,950,201+588,229+190,947+63,318+629,963 = 13,711,168; adding MLTC Resource Development if government transfer = 1,117,222 brings total to 14,828,390 — used conservative estimate of identifiable government transfers excluding MLTC Resource Development.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
